headline: How to Invest Now If You Want to Profit from the 2026 World Cup
summary: The FIFA World Cup is going to generate up to $40.9 billion worth of consumer spend, and a lot of companies will see a major boost in revenue. Fortunately, there's still time for investors to cash in on World Cup fever.
